search.query: `cisco_oi_index("$cpyKey$")` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:devicegroup | mvexpand groupName | dedup groupName | table groupName | sort groupName

condition.set: [| tstats values(deviceId) as deviceId WHERE ( `cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:devicegroupmember groupName="$groupIdSelected$")]
search [| tstats values(deviceId) as deviceId WHERE ( `cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:devicegroupmember groupName="$groupIdSelected$")]

search.query: | stats count as Init | eval Label="Crashes in Last 30 Days" | table Label

| inputlookup `cisco_oi_device_lookup($cpyKey$)` | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | search resetReason=*error* OR resetReason=*critical* OR resetReason=*exception* OR resetReason=*watchdog* OR resetReason=*panic* OR resetReason=*cpu* OR resetReason=*localsoft* | eval lastResetEpoch = strptime(lastResetTimestamp, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S") | where lastResetEpoch > (now() - (30*86400)) | stats count as Devices
| stats count as Init | eval Label="Crashes in Last 60 Days" | table Label

| inputlookup `cisco_oi_device_lookup($cpyKey$)` | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | search resetReason=*error* OR resetReason=*critical* OR resetReason=*exception* OR resetReason=*watchdog* OR resetReason=*panic* OR resetReason=*cpu* OR resetReason=*localsoft* | eval lastResetEpoch = strptime(lastResetTimestamp, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S") | where lastResetEpoch > (now() - (60*86400)) | stats count as Devices
| stats count as Init | eval Label="Crashes in Last 90 Days" | table Label

| inputlookup `cisco_oi_device_lookup($cpyKey$)` | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | search resetReason=*error* OR resetReason=*critical* OR resetReason=*exception* OR resetReason=*watchdog* OR resetReason=*panic* OR resetReason=*cpu* OR resetReason=*localsoft* | eval lastResetEpoch = strptime(lastResetTimestamp, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S") | where lastResetEpoch > (now() - (90*86400)) | stats count as Devices

panel.title: Crashes in Last 30 Days by Reset Reason

search.query: | inputlookup `cisco_oi_device_lookup($cpyKey$)` | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | eval resetReason=lower(resetReason) | search resetReason=*error* OR resetReason=*critical* OR resetReason=*exception* OR resetReason=*watchdog* OR resetReason=*panic* OR resetReason=*cpu* OR resetReason=*localsoft* | eval lastResetEpoch = strptime(lastResetTimestamp, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S") | where lastResetEpoch > (now() - (30*86400)) | eval resetReason = case(match(resetReason,".*panic.*"), "Kernel Panic", match(resetReason,".*s/w reset.*"), "Software Reset", match(resetReason,".*software.*"), "Software Exception", match(resetReason,".*critical process.*"), "Critical Process Crash", match(resetReason,".*watchdog time.*"), "Watchdog Timeout", match(resetReason,".*error at pc.*"), "Parity Check Error", match(resetReason,".*cpu.*"), "CPU Usage", match(resetReason,".*localsoft.*"), "LocalSoft ADR", 1=1, resetReason) | fillnull value=null resetReason | stats count as Devices by resetReason | sort -Devices

panel.title: Crashes in Last 30 Days by PID

search.query: | inputlookup `cisco_oi_device_lookup($cpyKey$)` | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | search resetReason=*error* OR resetReason=*critical* OR resetReason=*exception* OR resetReason=*watchdog* OR resetReason=*panic* OR resetReason=*cpu* OR resetReason=*localsoft* | eval lastResetEpoch = strptime(lastResetTimestamp, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S") | where lastResetEpoch > (now() - (30*86400)) | stats count as Devices by productId | sort -Devices

panel.title: Crashes in Last 60 Days by Reset Reason

search.query: | inputlookup `cisco_oi_device_lookup($cpyKey$)` | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | eval resetReason=lower(resetReason) | search resetReason=*error* OR resetReason=*critical* OR resetReason=*exception* OR resetReason=*watchdog* OR resetReason=*panic* OR resetReason=*cpu* OR resetReason=*localsoft* | eval lastResetEpoch = strptime(lastResetTimestamp, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S") | where lastResetEpoch > (now() - (60*86400)) | eval resetReason = case(match(resetReason,".*panic.*"), "Kernel Panic", match(resetReason,".*s/w reset.*"), "Software Reset", match(resetReason,".*software.*"), "Software Exception", match(resetReason,".*critical process.*"), "Critical Process Crash", match(resetReason,".*watchdog time.*"), "Watchdog Timeout", match(resetReason,".*error at pc.*"), "Parity Check Error", match(resetReason,".*cpu.*"), "CPU Usage", match(resetReason,".*localsoft.*"), "LocalSoft ADR", 1=1, resetReason) | fillnull value=null resetReason | stats count as Devices by resetReason | sort -Devices

panel.title: Crashes in Last 60 Days by PID

search.query: | inputlookup `cisco_oi_device_lookup($cpyKey$)` | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | search resetReason=*error* OR resetReason=*critical* OR resetReason=*exception* OR resetReason=*watchdog* OR resetReason=*panic* OR resetReason=*cpu* OR resetReason=*localsoft* | eval lastResetEpoch = strptime(lastResetTimestamp, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S") | where lastResetEpoch > (now() - (60*86400)) | stats count as Devices by productId | sort -Devices

panel.title: Crashes in Last 90 Days by Reset Reason

search.query: | inputlookup `cisco_oi_device_lookup($cpyKey$)` | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | eval resetReason=lower(resetReason) | search resetReason=*error* OR resetReason=*critical* OR resetReason=*exception* OR resetReason=*watchdog* OR resetReason=*panic* OR resetReason=*cpu* OR resetReason=*localsoft* | eval lastResetEpoch = strptime(lastResetTimestamp, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S") | where lastResetEpoch > (now() - (90*86400)) | eval resetReason = case(match(resetReason,".*panic.*"), "Kernel Panic", match(resetReason,".*s/w reset.*"), "Software Reset", match(resetReason,".*software.*"), "Software Exception", match(resetReason,".*critical process.*"), "Critical Process Crash", match(resetReason,".*watchdog time.*"), "Watchdog Timeout", match(resetReason,".*error at pc.*"), "Parity Check Error", match(resetReason,".*cpu.*"), "CPU Usage", match(resetReason,".*localsoft.*"), "LocalSoft ADR", 1=1, resetReason) | fillnull value=null resetReason | stats count as Devices by resetReason | sort -Devices

panel.title: Crashes in Last 90 Days by PID

search.query: | inputlookup `cisco_oi_device_lookup($cpyKey$)` | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | search resetReason=*error* OR resetReason=*critical* OR resetReason=*exception* OR resetReason=*watchdog* OR resetReason=*panic* OR resetReason=*cpu* OR resetReason=*localsoft* | eval lastResetEpoch = strptime(lastResetTimestamp, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S") | where lastResetEpoch > (now() - (90*86400)) | stats count as Devices by productId | sort -Devices

panel.title: Crashes in Last 30 Days by SW Version & Type

search.query: | inputlookup `cisco_oi_device_lookup($cpyKey$)` | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | search resetReason=*error* OR resetReason=*critical* OR resetReason=*exception* OR resetReason=*watchdog* OR resetReason=*panic* OR resetReason=*cpu* OR resetReason=*localsoft* | eval lastResetEpoch = strptime(lastResetTimestamp, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S") | where lastResetEpoch > (now() - (30*86400)) | stats count as Devices by softwareType, softwareVersion | sort -Devices

panel.title: Crashes in Last 30 Days by SW Type

search.query: | inputlookup `cisco_oi_device_lookup($cpyKey$)` | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | search resetReason=*error* OR resetReason=*critical* OR resetReason=*exception* OR resetReason=*watchdog* OR resetReason=*panic* OR resetReason=*cpu* OR resetReason=*localsoft* | eval lastResetEpoch = strptime(lastResetTimestamp, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S") | where lastResetEpoch > (now() - (30*86400)) | stats count as Devices by softwareType | sort -Devices

panel.title: Crashes in Last 60 Days by SW Version & Type

search.query: | inputlookup `cisco_oi_device_lookup($cpyKey$)` | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | search resetReason=*error* OR resetReason=*critical* OR resetReason=*exception* OR resetReason=*watchdog* OR resetReason=*panic* OR resetReason=*cpu* OR resetReason=*localsoft* | eval lastResetEpoch = strptime(lastResetTimestamp, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S") | where lastResetEpoch > (now() - (60*86400)) | stats count as Devices by softwareType, softwareVersion | sort -Devices

panel.title: Crashes in Last 60 Days by SW Type

search.query: | inputlookup `cisco_oi_device_lookup($cpyKey$)` | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | search resetReason=*error* OR resetReason=*critical* OR resetReason=*exception* OR resetReason=*watchdog* OR resetReason=*panic* OR resetReason=*cpu* OR resetReason=*localsoft* | eval lastResetEpoch = strptime(lastResetTimestamp, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S") | where lastResetEpoch > (now() - (60*86400)) | stats count as Devices by softwareType | sort -Devices

panel.title: Crashes in Last 90 Days by SW Version & Type

search.query: | inputlookup `cisco_oi_device_lookup($cpyKey$)` | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | search resetReason=*error* OR resetReason=*critical* OR resetReason=*exception* OR resetReason=*watchdog* OR resetReason=*panic* OR resetReason=*cpu* OR resetReason=*localsoft* | eval lastResetEpoch = strptime(lastResetTimestamp, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S") | where lastResetEpoch > (now() - (90*86400)) | stats count as Devices by softwareType, softwareVersion | sort -Devices

panel.title: Crashes in Last 90 Days by SW Type

search.query: | inputlookup `cisco_oi_device_lookup($cpyKey$)` | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | search resetReason=*error* OR resetReason=*critical* OR resetReason=*exception* OR resetReason=*watchdog* OR resetReason=*panic* OR resetReason=*cpu* OR resetReason=*localsoft* | eval lastResetEpoch = strptime(lastResetTimestamp, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S") | where lastResetEpoch > (now() - (90*86400)) | stats count as Devices by softwareType | sort -Devices
| stats count as Init | eval label="Download" | table label

table.title: Download details using 'Export' button on lower right

search.query: | inputlookup `cisco_oi_device_lookup($cpyKey$)` | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | search resetReason=*error* OR resetReason=*critical* OR resetReason=*exception* OR resetReason=*watchdog* OR resetReason=*panic* OR resetReason=*cpu* OR resetReason=*localsoft* | eval lastResetEpoch = strptime(lastResetTimestamp, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S") | eval ninetyDaysEpoch = 90*86400 | eval last90crash = if((now() - lastResetEpoch) < ninetyDaysEpoch, 1, 0) | table deviceId, deviceName, deviceIp, productId, productFamily, softwareVersion, softwareType, lastResetTimestamp, last90crash, resetReason, riskCategory, riskScore, groupName
